item.title: The Best Graduation Speech Is One Nobody Remembers
item.description: The commencement speech is a ritual act, not an expressive one.
item.dc:creator: Ian Bogost

item.title: What Los Angeles Has Become
item.description: Spencer Pratt is the factory-reset option in the mayoral race.
item.dc:creator: Meghan Daum

item.title: Trump Doesn’t Want to Fight Inflation
item.description: He was elected to tackle one problem. Instead, he’s made it worse.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Chait

item.title: Pay Attention
item.description: Essential advice for the class of 2026
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Haidt

item.title: How the Environmental Movement Lost Its Power
item.description: And how to get it back
item.dc:creator: John Reid

item.title: The Men Who Want Women to Be Quiet
item.description: A virulent form of misogyny has become the single most important force holding together the American right.
item.dc:creator: Helen Lewis

item.title: The Trump Counterterrorism Strategy Makes America More Vulnerable
item.description: The policy is unfocused, run by amateurs, and concerned more with the president’s many grievances than with the security of the United States.
item.dc:creator: Tom Nichols

item.title: The Democrats Can’t Let Go of Racial Preferences
item.description: How to persuade skeptical voters to take a fresh look at the party
item.dc:creator: Richard D. Kahlenberg

item.title: The Final Hours
item.description: An Afghan family’s flight to safety
item.dc:creator: George Packer

item.title: The Close, Prolonged Contact Myth
item.description: Knowing how a virus spreads is essential to public health, but people keep getting it wrong.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Allen
